description: Graphic in portrait orientation. The right two-thirds is a warm-toned photograph of two pairs of hands clasped together, with a blurred seated person in a light blue top in the background. A blue translucent panel on the left holds white text: 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by a large bold 'HELP'. An orange angled shape sits at the right edge. A white band across the bottom contains '1-855-48-VOICE' and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE' (with 'VOICE' in orange) beside a stylized blue 'V' logo and the text 'VOICE, VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT'.
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT
